name: Wolves in the Chetwood
rewards: wolf-pelts; the east road made quiet
flavorIntro: Yellow eyes ring the firelight. The pack has trailed the band since dusk, and hunger has made them bold.
designNote: Onramp rung 2 (Design B, swarm). ~20-min grind through a wolf-pack. Asks TWO questions: sustain (drain) AND whether the Warden can hold the line so the Keeper survives the wolf-lunges (spikes). Validated at band Lv3 (unlock floor), 5000 runs: Lv3 food 6%, Lv4 81%, Lv5 93%, Lv6 97%, Lv7 99%, Lv8 ~100%. Completely unwinnable at Lv1/Lv2 food (0% at any band level). Needs max Hearthkeeper food (Lv4) for a real chance; first Initiate food (Lv5) is the comfort threshold. Band leveling helps meaningfully — Lv4 food improves from 80% at band Lv3 to 97% at band Lv8. physMit stays 0 — armor is a LATER rung's question.
